ns0:entry.ns0:title: Adam-CAD/CADAM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Adam-CAD/CADAM
Language: typescript
CADAM is the open source text-to-CAD web application

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KeygraphHQ/shannon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KeygraphHQ/shannon
Language: typescript
Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ThinkInAIXYZ/deepchat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ThinkInAIXYZ/deepchat
Language: typescript
🐬DeepChat - A smart assistant that connects powerful AI to your personal world

ns0:entry.ns0:title: code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
Language: typescript
omo; the best agent harness - previously oh-my-opencode

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ghostfolio/ghostfolio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ghostfolio/ghostfolio
Language: typescript
Open Source Wealth Management Software. Angular + NestJS + Prisma + Nx + TypeScript 🤍

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-labs-code/stitch-skills
Language: typescript
A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kirodotdev/Kiro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kirodotdev/Kiro
Language: typescript
Kiro is an agentic IDE that works alongside you from prototype to production.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:title: midudev/libros-programacion-gratis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/midudev/libros-programacion-gratis
Language: typescript
📚 Lista de libros sobre programación en Español y gratis

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-metadata/OpenMetadata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-metadata/OpenMetadata
Language: typescript
OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vas3k/TaxHacker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vas3k/TaxHacker
Language: typescript
Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zilliztech/claude-context
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zilliztech/claude-context
Language: typescript
Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
